summary: Marie Awad alleges that Catholic Family Service and George Phillips breached fiduciary duties owed in the administration of the Estate of Emil Awad, and engaged in abuse of process — seeking declaratory relief and damages.
status: Active (transferred from Macomb County Circuit Court)

count_descriptions.1: CFS and Phillips violated duties of loyalty and care owed to Marie as estate beneficiary.
count_descriptions.2: Defendants made material misrepresentations to the court about Marie's cooperation and estate assets.
count_descriptions.3: Request for court determination regarding the rights and duties of parties under the estate.
count_descriptions.4: Phillips used court proceedings for improper purposes including sanctions motions and character attacks.
